items.headline: PTC reports Q2 2026 results with 8.5% constant currency ARR growth and new $2B share repurchase authorization
PTC expands startup program beyond aerospace and defense to companies across all industries
PTC completes sale of Kepware and ThingWorx IoT businesses to TPG affiliate
PTC announces Windchill designated as official PLM and PDM platform by U.S. Army
PTC launches Windchill AI Assistant to simplify how teams find and leverage product data
PTC unveils new robotics design-to-simulation workflow connecting Onshape with NVIDIA Isaac Sim
